title: Cyber-Sovereign Evidence Graph & Benchmark-to-Production RSI Flywheel
short: Convert benchmark results into a production-grade evidence graph that improves future routing.
problem: Benchmarks prove isolated results; institutions need an evidence graph that remembers what worked, who proved it, who reviewed it, what reproduced, what failed, and how it performed later.
mission: Build an evidence graph that connects benchmark evidence to production routing, delayed outcomes, reviewer reliability, settlement memory, and future Selection Gate decisions.
why: This is the hard-to-copy moat: a long-running evidence graph cannot be retroactively fabricated.
plans: Route future work through proven artifacts
goals: Turn validated work into production capability
